# protonpass_item_ssh_key (Data Source)

Reads a specific Proton Pass SSH Key item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_item_ssh_key" "example" {
  item_id  = "item_id_here"
  share_id = "share_id_here"
}

output "public_key" {
  value = data.protonpass_item_ssh_key.example.public_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) Item ID.
- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) Private Key.
- `public_key` (String) Public Key.
- `title` (String) Title of the item.
